title: esenbeckia grandiflora var. intermedia
intro: Esenbeckia grandiflora var. intermedia, also known as "Willow-leaf" or "Intermediate Esenbeckia", is a plant species within the Rutaceae family, native to South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Peru and Bolivia, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Esenbeckia grandiflora var. intermedia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and treat gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote digestion, reduce inflammation, and support immune function.
